name: Clay Editorial
description: Calm premium editorial. Warm ivory canvas, a clay/terracotta accent, refined Fraunces serif display over clean Inter body, generous whitespace, soft-rounded cards. Restrained and trustworthy — reads like a modern research lab or thoughtful product site.
descriptionZh: 克制的高级编辑风：暖象牙底 + 陶土色（clay #CC785C）强调色 + 精炼 Fraunces 衬线标题 + 干净 Inter 正文 + 大留白 + 柔角卡片。克制、可信，像现代研究机构 / 思想型产品官网。
bestFor: 产品 keynote / 严肃汇报
思想型 / 信息驱动内容
